channel.title: MFA on Tony's Tech Notes
channel.description: Recent content in MFA on Tony's Tech Notes

item.title: Microsoft Entra: Passkeys by Default & SMS/Voice Retirement — Admin Advisory
item.description: Microsoft Entra is making passkeys the default authentication method and retiring Microsoft-provided SMS and voice MFA. Here's what it is, why it's happening, and what admins need to do before February 1, 2027.
